businessSummary.oneLiner: The undisputed king of AI computing — dominating global AI infrastructure with data center GPUs and accelerators
businessSummary.description: NVIDIA is the world's largest semiconductor design company, with AI training/inference data center accelerators as the core revenue driver. FY2026 revenue $215.9B (+65% YoY), Q4 revenue $68.1B (+73% YoY). Friday close $180.25 (-1.58%). GTC 2026 opens Monday (3/16) — Jensen Huang keynote to unveil Vera Rubin platform + Blackwell Ultra (B300) + agentic AI-optimized CPU racks. CNBC: 'CPU is the GTC pivot point'. Palantir sovereign AI DC architecture co-announcement. MarketBeat consensus $274.21. Market cap $4.38T, Forward P/E 22.63x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Data Center: AI training/inference GPUs (H100, H200, Blackwell B200/GB200/GB300) — ~91% of revenue
Gaming: GeForce RTX GPUs — ~6% of revenue
Professional Visualization: Omniverse, RTX — ~2% of revenue

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: AI growth premium reflected. Reasonable for large-cap tech

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 $215.9B. Q4 alone +73%. Explosive growth continues

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reflects monopolistic pricing power in AI GPUs. Historic highs

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Slight decline from Blackwell transition but still top-tier

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: Record FCF. Ample capacity for buybacks + R&D

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier capital efficiency. Chip design business strength

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 Opens Monday — Vera Rubin + CPU Agentic AI Pivot
growthDrivers.description: CNBC (3/13): 'CPU is the GTC star'. Agentic AI-optimized CPU racks emerging alongside GPUs as new AI infrastructure pillar. Vera Rubin (HBM4, 22TB/s) + Blackwell Ultra B300 announcement expected. 'AI's Super Bowl'.

growthDrivers.title: Palantir+NVIDIA Sovereign AI DC Architecture Co-Announcement
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): Turnkey sovereign AI DC architecture unveiled. GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, LG CNS and other major customers adopting. Enterprise AI market expansion.

growthDrivers.title: 93% Analyst Buy — MarketBeat $274 (+52% Upside)
growthDrivers.description: MarketBeat: Consensus $274.21 (+52%). 35 of 38 analysts rate Buy. Broad consensus that market selloff is a buying opportunity.

growthDrivers.title: Forward P/E 22.63x — Historically Undervalued vs Growth Rate
growthDrivers.description: +65% growth at Forward P/E 22.63x, PEG 0.35. Compelling value unless AI hypercycle ends.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: CUDA ecosystem with 15M+ developer lock-in, 90%+ market share in AI training/inference GPU market. Software+hardware integration is the core moat.

moats.description: 15M+ developer lock-in. Most AI frameworks optimized for CUDA.
Blackwell→Rubin→Feynman 2-year architecture innovation cycle. 1-2 generations ahead of competitors.

competitors.name: AMD (MI400)
competitors.detail: AI GPU #2. Cost-effective alternative. Hyperscaler adoption growing

competitors.name: Intel (Gaudi 3)
competitors.detail: Late entrant in AI accelerators. Differentiating with Windows NPU focus

competitors.name: Google (TPU)
competitors.detail: In-house AI chip. Primarily for internal use

competitors.name: Broadcom (ASIC)
competitors.detail: Custom AI chip design. Hyperscaler alternative

recentNews.headline: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Live Updates Blog Opens
recentNews.significance: NVIDIA Blog: GTC pre-show begins. Jensen Huang keynote Monday officially launches the Rubin Era.

recentNews.headline: CNBC: CPU Is the GTC Pivot Point — The Agentic AI Era
recentNews.significance: Shift from GPU-only to CPU+GPU hybrid racks. Agentic AI workloads to feature CPU-only rack debut. NVIDIA TAM expansion.

recentNews.headline: Yahoo Finance: GTC 2026 — NVIDIA's Biggest Event Preview
recentNews.significance: Vera Rubin + Blackwell Ultra + sovereign AI DC + autonomous driving infrastructure convergence. AI economy litmus test.

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: Agentic AI & LPU Analysis Before GTC
recentNews.significance: Jensen Huang's agentic AI emphasis sets GTC 2026 core theme. Inference-centric architecture transition accelerating.

recentNews.headline: Palantir+NVIDIA Sovereign AI DC Architecture Unveiled
recentNews.significance: GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, LG CNS among major adopters. Enterprise AI infrastructure market expansion.

analystOpinions.notableComment: MarketBeat: Consensus $274.21 (+52%). StockAnalysis: 93% Buy/Strong Buy. Redburn: 'Unless oil hits $150, NVIDIA will dominate next week'. Broad consensus that selloff is opportunity.

risks.title: AI Capex Cycle Peak Concerns + Oil Surge to $98
risks.description: WTI $98.71 (3/13). Oil surge adds cost pressure on hyperscalers + GPU demand could drop if AI investment slows.

risks.title: Export Controls — China/Russia Restrictions Tightening
risks.description: US government AI chip export controls intensifying. China market (~12% of revenue) access increasingly limited.

risks.title: GTC 'Sell the News' Possibility
risks.description: Market may have already priced in GTC expectations. Disappointment could trigger selloff.

risks.title: Blackwell→Rubin Transition Cannibalization
risks.description: Customers may delay Blackwell orders to wait for Rubin. Transition period revenue gap risk.

risks.title: $4.38T Market Cap Fatigue
risks.description: World's largest company title. Psychological resistance to further upside.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 22.63x — Extreme Undervaluation vs 65% Growth
buyReasons.rationale: PEG 0.35. Most attractive growth-to-valuation ratio among large-cap tech.

buyReasons.title: GTC 2026 Monday Opening — AI's Super Bowl Catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Vera Rubin + B300 + CPU agentic AI rack announcements to confirm demand pipeline + expand TAM.

buyReasons.title: Consensus +52% Upside — $274 Target
buyReasons.rationale: 93% analyst Buy rating. Broad agreement that market volatility created price opportunity.

buyReasons.title: FY2026 Revenue $215.9B, Q4 $68.1B — Growth Accelerating
buyReasons.rationale: +65% YoY growth, Q4 alone +73%. Blackwell mass shipments driving growth engine.

overallOpinion: NVIDIA closed at $180.25 (-1.58%) ahead of GTC 2026 Monday opening. Forward P/E 22.63x (PEG 0.35) represents historic undervaluation relative to +65% growth.
CNBC: 'CPU is the GTC pivot' — Agentic AI-optimized CPU racks add to GPU TAM. Vera Rubin + B300 + Palantir sovereign AI DC form the next-gen demand pipeline.
Oil at $98 is a macro risk, but Redburn analyst: 'Unless oil hits $150, NVIDIA will be front and center next week'. 93% Buy consensus. Current price is a long-term buying opportunity.

sources.name: CNBC
sources.description: Redburn analyst: NVIDIA front and center next week

threads.hook: Monday: NVIDIA GTC opens — CPU joins the AI party 🧠
threads.text: FY2026 $216B (+65%), Forward P/E 22.6x. Vera Rubin + CPU agentic AI racks. 93% Buy, target $274 (+52%). Oil at $98 is the wildcard. Monday has the answers. 🔗 investory.kro.kr/stock/NVDA/analysis/2026-03-14
